name: Hessian
long_description:
Hessian is the platform for automating business operations with AI agents. We forward deploy  to embed with your team, learn how the work actually gets done, and build the agents on our platform that run the work end-to-end. Unlike off-the-shelf tools that don't know your business, you get a partner that owns the software end-to-end and operates it every day.

We all met and studied computer science at Durham University and have known each other for ten years. James and Bao went on to work together as software engineers at Bloomberg, delivering billions of financial time series observations a day. James went on to DRW building data infrastructure and pipelines for commodities trading desks. Bao then co-founded Zettafleet to build a decentralized training platform for large language models on hundreds of GPUs. Tom built a 0-to-1 retail trading app for US investors at CMC markets, before joining GoCardless to scale processing capacity to over £1 billion in payment volumes within a day.

Sitting with our customers, we discovered that no one inside had the capacity or resources to build these systems that would help them scale with their operational challenges. So we built the platform that solves this and are now saving them hundreds of hours a month. We forward deploy on-site to map the work, and build the agents on our platform to do it. Over time, we are building the standard for how companies should deploy, operate and govern AI agents. Every deployment compounds, our cycles get faster, the platform and our playbook improves with each iteration, and every customer benefits.

Why now? Coding agents have matured to the point where, combined with the engineering judgment we've built across a decade of shipping production systems, we can scale forward-deployed engagements and take on more customers with minimal headcount. We are also building FDE agents and tooling that accelerate how quickly we automate workflows on our platform.

Trillions of dollars a year are spent on knowledge work. Capturing even a single-digit percentage of that spend through automation is a market measured in the hundreds of billions.
one_liner: We forward deploy with AI agents to automate business operations
